title: The Swamp Priest Appears
description: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Luffy, Eneru, Gan Fall. Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey, what's your problem!!? Want to Fight!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop! Don't say any more!!! Ah----!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The Raiders and God are enemies?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...that is, if you have the strength

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But are they our enemy too?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Damn it..... What's this island's problem...?

summary: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
